title: RAIB witness appeal - Ealing Broadway station
body: "At around 00:07 on Sunday 24 November 2024, a passenger’s hand got stuck in the doors of a departing Elizabeth line train on platform 3 of Ealing Broadway station. The train departed with the passenger’s hand still trapped in the doors before they were pulled clear of the train by a member of staff.  RAIB is conducting an independent safety investigation into this incident and would like to hear from the passenger involved or anyone who witnessed the incident.  If you have any information, please call 01332 253324 during office hours or email witness@raib.gov.uk at any time. Any contact will be treated in the strictest confidence #Ealingbroadway "
